**SGSC-AI Intelligence Probe Executed**

The Apple Inc. hallucination has been successfully purged. Nanjing Yifa Technology Co., Ltd. presents a textbook case of 'Brand Riding' paired with 'Incubator Base Shelling'. In the electronics industry, 'Yifa' (意法) is heavily recognized as the Chinese abbreviation for STMicroelectronics, a global semiconductor giant. Despite adopting this powerful name and registering under 'Electronic Device Manufacturing', physical metrics violently invalidate any manufacturing capacity. The firm operates with only 3 insured employees and a meager 195k RMB in paid-in capital. Its address, 'Pioneer Entrepreneurship 181 on the 10th Floor', indicates a single desk or micro-office within a co-working incubator. The extensive manufacturing claims—ranging from computers to cameras and home appliances—are pure fiction. This entity is conclusively diagnosed as a micro-distributor of electronic components (capitalizing on the 'Yifa' namesake for B2B search visibility) and a small-scale IT software services node, completely devoid of physical industrial facilities.
